nowayup.hud.title: No Way Up
nowayup.whisper.5: Do not open the door. It is already open.
nowayup.whisper.6: That was not you passing by.
nowayup.message.watcher_seen: You saw it too, didn't you?
nowayup.message.death_not_way_out: Death was not a way out.
nowayup.message.wall_opens_wrong: The wall opens the wrong way.
nowayup.message.do_not_wake_up: This time, do not wake up.
nowayup.message.replacement_1: You waited long enough for it to learn you.
nowayup.message.replacement_2: You are not the one moving anymore.
nowayup.message.witness_warned: Do not warn them. They warned you too.
nowayup.message.seal_1: AND SOMEONE TAUGHT IT TO SLEEP.
nowayup.message.seal_2: The mine is quiet. For now.
nowayup.message.elias_1: You came without a map. Good.
nowayup.message.elias_2: Maps are how it learned us.
nowayup.message.elias_final: This was before up belonged to it.
nowayup.message.dawn_1: You carried every name back to the morning.
nowayup.message.dawn_2: For once, the way out stayed open.
nowayup.message.descent: You found a way down. That was never allowed.
nowayup.message.loop: How far will you climb this time?
nowayup.collapse.0: The mirror mine is holding its breath.
nowayup.collapse.2: The way behind you is closing.
nowayup.collapse.4: The mine is forgetting its shape.
nowayup.command.crash: No Way Up crash packet sent to %s player(s).
nowayup.command.ending_return_ticks: Ending return timer set to %s tick(s).
nowayup.command.reset_source: Reset No Way Up endings for %s.
nowayup.book.shaft0.title: Shaft 0 Survey
nowayup.book.shaft0.page1:
Shaft 0 cannot be mapped.

Routes alter after observation.

Do not leave markers you are not willing to see again.
nowayup.book.shaft0.page2:
Every tunnel we marked as rising has led us lower.

The foreman says the instruments are broken.

All six of them?
nowayup.book.upward_grave.title: The Upward Grave
nowayup.book.upward_grave.page1:
DO NOT CLIMB.

THE MINE LEARNED THE SKY.
nowayup.book.upward_grave.page2:
If the tunnel rises, turn around.

If the door is open, do not close it.

If you hear your name, do not answer.
nowayup.book.mirror_note.title: Mirror Note
nowayup.book.mirror_note.page1:
There are no monsters here.

That means it already ate them.
nowayup.book.mirror_note.page2:
Do not climb this time.

The exit hates the light.

Your shadow left first.
nowayup.book.elias_journal.title: Elias Ward's Journal
nowayup.book.elias_journal.page1:
Day 14

We climbed for three hours today.

When we stopped, the depth gauge said we were lower than breakfast.
nowayup.book.elias_journal.page2:
I saw myself at the end of the rail line.

It did not move.

It was waiting where I will be.
nowayup.book.name_note.title: A Note With Your Name
nowayup.book.name_note.page1:
Why did you come back?

You were closer when you stopped trying to leave.
nowayup.book.name_note.page2:
The tunnel remembers your footsteps.

It puts them ahead of you.
nowayup.book.do_not_open.title: Do Not Open It
nowayup.book.do_not_open.page1:
Do not open the door.

It is already open.
nowayup.book.do_not_open.page2:
If you see yourself, do not answer.

If you answer, it will know which voice to keep.
nowayup.crash.message:
Internal Exception: java.lang.IllegalStateException: There is no way up.

The mine kept the others.
Come back inside.
advancements.nowayup.root.title: No Way Up
advancements.nowayup.endings.loop.title: Loop Ending
advancements.nowayup.endings.loop.descri: You climbed back into the beginning.
advancements.nowayup.endings.descent.des: You found a way down. That was never allowed.
advancements.nowayup.endings.replacement: You waited long enough for it to learn you.
advancements.nowayup.endings.witness.des: You arrived early enough to see yourself waiting.
advancements.nowayup.endings.seal.title: Seal Ending
advancements.nowayup.endings.seal.descri: The mine is quiet. For now.
advancements.nowayup.endings.elias.title: Elias Ending
advancements.nowayup.endings.dawn.title: Dawn Ending
advancements.nowayup.endings.dawn.descri: You carried every name back to the morning.
